caption: A man with a dark beard and short dark hair, wearing a grey button-down shirt, is seated in front of a dark blue background featuring repeating faded text that reads "DAILY ROUND-UP". A logo for "peoples dispatch" is visible in the top left corner of every scene. The man is speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands resting on a surface in front of him. A small clip-on microphone is attached to his shirt. In one segment, a small inset video appears in the top right corner showing a man in a suit speaking at a White House podium. Accompanying this inset is on-screen text that reads, "'We cannot, we will not stand by as our people are threatened by a kangaroo court,' -Mike Pompeo-". As the sequence progresses, the inset video and the corresponding quote disappear, returning the focus entirely to the man in the grey shirt.
